title: New top local AI image generator is here! Already uncensored
summary: Krea 2 is an open-source AI image generator available for local deployment via ComfyUI. The model supports LoRA fine-tuning and includes rebalancing capabilities for conditional generation.
writeup: The video covers Krea 2, an open-source text-to-image generator that runs locally through ComfyUI. It matters because the model ships without content restrictions and supports local deployment rather than relying on a hosted service. Concrete takeaways: the model supports LoRA fine-tuning and includes rebalancing capabilities for conditional generation.
